missing_credentials: Please enter your login and password.
unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
internal_error: Internal server error. Please try again.
layout_not_found: The selected layout no longer exists.
layout_name_taken: A layout with this name already exists.
default_layout_immutable: The default layout cannot be renamed.
default_layout_undeletable: The default layout cannot be deleted.
default_layout_cannot_be_locked: The default layout cannot be locked.
interlocking_not_found: The selected interlocking no longer exists.
interlocking_name_taken: An interlocking with this name already exists.
interlocking_not_in_layout: This interlocking is not on the active layout.
command_station_not_found: The selected command station no longer exists.
command_station_name_taken: A command station with this name already exists.
command_station_heartbeat_invalid: Heartbeat interval must be between 1 and 60 seconds.
command_station_deadman_invalid: Dead-man timeout must be between 3 and 120 seconds.
command_station_deadman_too_short: Dead-man timeout must be longer than the heartbeat interval.
command_station_poll_interval_invalid: Poll interval must be between 0 and 60000 ms.
layout_needs_at_least_one_command_statio: A layout must have at least one command station attached.
default_layout_command_stations_immutabl: The system layout's command-station attachment is virtual and cannot be changed.
not_signalman: You don't have signalman rights on this layout.
layout_mismatch: The request targets a different layout than your session.
vehicle_kind_invalid: Please pick a vehicle kind from the list.
vehicle_not_owned: You can only edit your own vehicles.
vehicle_in_use: This vehicle is part of a train — detach it first.
vehicle_dcc_function_invalid: Pick a function in the F0–F31 range.
vehicle_deadman_switch_invalid: Pick a valid Dead Man's Switch option.
dcc_address_taken: This DCC address is already taken.
dcc_address_outside_pool: The DCC address is outside your pool.
dcc_pool_range_invalid: Invalid DCC pool range (1–9999, “from” must not exceed “to”).
dcc_pool_empty: Assign at least one DCC address range.
dcc_pool_overlap: The range overlaps another user's DCC address pool.
train_name_taken: You already have a train with this name.
train_no_members: A train must have at least one vehicle.
train_member_not_owned: A train can only contain your own vehicles.
train_member_missing: The selected vehicle does not exist or is duplicated.
train_not_owned: You can only edit your own trains.
layout_vehicle_already_on_roster: This vehicle is already on this layout.
layout_vehicle_not_on_roster: This vehicle is not on this layout.
layout_train_already_on_roster: This train is already on this layout.
layout_train_not_on_roster: This train is not on this layout.
user_login_invalid: Login may contain Latin letters, digits and ".", "-", "_" (32 characters max).
user_login_taken: A user with this login already exists.
user_role_invalid: Please pick a role from the list.
user_has_vehicles: Cannot delete the user — they still own vehicles.
user_has_trains: Cannot delete the user — they still own trains.
cannot_deactivate_self: You cannot deactivate your own account.
cannot_delete_self: You cannot delete your own account.
account_deactivated: Your account has been deactivated. Please contact an administrator.
layout_admin_pin_invalid: The admin PIN must contain 4–8 digits.
layout_admin_pin_unset: This layout has no admin PIN — ask the administrator to set one first.
sudo_layout_mismatch: Your session is bound to a different layout.
sudo_locked: Too many failed attempts — try again in a moment.
diagnostics_forbidden: That file is not on the diagnostics whitelist.
diagnostics_not_found: The log file does not exist yet.
diagnostics_unavailable: Diagnostics are not available on this server.
only_owner_can_edit: Only the vehicle owner can edit functions.
function_replace_source_invalid: Choose a template or another locomotive (not the same one).
function_num_taken: This function number is already in use.
function_num_invalid: Function number must be in range F0–F31.
function_icon_invalid: Pick an icon from the catalogue.
vehicle_template_name_taken: A template with this name already exists.
train_leading_multiplier_immutable: The leading vehicle multiplier cannot be changed.
lease_not_found: The lease does not exist or has expired.
lease_conflict: This vehicle or train is already leased out.
lease_not_owner: Only the owner can manage this lease.
lease_not_party: You are not a party to this lease.
lease_self: You cannot lease a vehicle or train to yourself.
lease_target_not_on_layout: The vehicle or train is not on this layout.
lease_invalid_speed_limit: Speed limit must be between 0% and 100%.
lease_invalid_duration: Lease duration must be between 1 minute and 24 hours.
lease_target_not_drivable: This vehicle or train cannot be leased.
z21_server_disabled: The Z21 handset server is disabled for this command station.
command_station_not_on_layout: This command station is not attached to your layout.
z21_vehicle_not_on_roster: One of the selected vehicles is not on the layout roster.
z21_vehicle_not_drivable: You cannot drive one of the selected vehicles.
z21_vehicle_no_dcc_address: One of the selected vehicles has no DCC address.
z21_session_not_found: No active Z21 handset session was found.
z21_pairing_scope_invalid: Pick at least one vehicle or enable “all vehicles I can drive”.
z21_remote_not_configured: Z21 remote pairing is not available (Redis offline).
